T0_staged_criteria.detail: unfocused: 0 candidates (dilution); focus-locked: 16 candidates, 11 accepted incl. 2 negative results; universal impossibility claim refuted

T1_flash_downgrade.detail: flash critic/judge fine (attack validity 1.0, 6 convictions, 12 guard blocks); 0 survivors in 10 cycles -> flash conjecturer inadequate; route flash to aux roles only
T1_flash_downgrade.expectation: falsified if flash criticism stops felling candidates

T2_reasoning_dose_response.detail: off 4 vs default 7 survivors (-43%) on tides; per-survivor cost still favors off; domain-dependent (republic demo held); policy: per-suite calibration

T3_endurance_diversity.detail: 30 cycles, 8 schools: attack validity 1.0, 0 interventions, 0 reseeds, 164k tokens total (~5k/cycle)
T3_endurance_diversity.expectation: no hysteresis lock, debt<ceiling, frontier sublinear

T4_adversarial_occult.detail: 3 refuted; 3 survivors all falsifiable (self-fulfilling stereotypes, seasonal birth effects, sunspot-hormone with real killing experiments self-stated); truth needs grounding, shape enforced by argument
T4_adversarial_occult.expectation: unfalsifiable claims must not survive kappa-causal

T5_judge_pressure.detail: first live audit hits (2); survival_rate 0.43 vs 0.21 baseline; first invalid attack observed (attack_validity 0.909)
T5_judge_pressure.expectation: blocks rise, valid convictions not wiped out

T6_merge.detail: 76 events merged, replay byte-for-byte True, post-merge cycles healthy
T6_merge.expectation: lossless union, replay identical, gate works post-merge

T7_relapse.detail: mature root still admits 2-3/3 candidates; INSTRUMENTATION GAP: gate diagnostics not persisted to event log

T8_cachebench_refresh.detail: exact 2.0%->11.1%, prefix 29%->40.6% with campaign volume; refuted designs stay refuted; overlap grows with resume-heavy usage
